_comment: PO workflow ElementId (GUID) -> readable Step name, resolved from live /api/po joined to po.xlsx export (2026-06-29). Only workflow-approval steps appear here (currently active set). Operational steps like 'LPO sent/shared with supplier' and 'Advance payment request submitted' are not approval work items; the dashboard derives those from PO status fields. Add new GUIDs as POs reach other approval steps.
